data.content: Shipment attempt on 2026-03-11 was blocked by a merge conflict when merging beat/foolery-02d0 (83a4f926f003) into main (61bb0efcc9f7). The only unresolved file is src/lib/backends/knots-backend.ts in /private/tmp/foolery-02d0-ship; lightbox and backend tests auto-merged cleanly. Resume from ready_for_implementation by reconciling that backend conflict, then re-run shipment.
